S.FORM: Ron Baker hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 3, Ron Baker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ron Baker hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 3, Ron Baker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ron βaker ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ron βaker, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
